results.name: blue dragon (dnd)
results.description: A desert-dwelling species of dragon from Dungeons and Dragons, known for its deadly lightning breath.

results.name: blue/orange
results.description: Features heavy amounts of the complimentary colors blue and orange, similar to a movie poster. Compare [bisexual lighting](bisexual-lighting).

results.name: blue ribbon
results.description: A wearable ribbon given to winners of a contest.

results.name: boar
results.description:
Oink. 🐖 
In Magic, Pigs, Hogs, and Boars are all catagorized under boar.

results.name: bobby
results.description: The barbarian from the Dungeons and Dragons cartoon.

results.name: boilerbilges
results.description: The region of Duskmourn associated with red mana.

results.name: bokeh
results.description: Artwork that blurs the out of focus aspects of the artwork, such as in the form of bright spots.

results.name: bolas horns
results.description: Nicol Bolas's iconic horns used as a symbol.

results.name: bolas staff
results.description: Staffs that are adorned with the trademark horns of Nicol Bolas

results.name: boltland
results.description: Lands you can pay 3 life/take 3 damage to have them enter untapped.

results.name: bombard
results.description: Sacrifice something else to deal N damage. See also [fling](/tags/card/fling), [bombard-self](bombard-self).

results.name: bombard-self
results.description: Sacrifice this permanent to deal N damage. See also [fling-self](/tags/card/fling-self), [bombard](bombard).

results.name: bondage
results.description: Chained up, bound and gagged, etc.

results.name: boob plate
results.description: An impractically shaped piece of plate armor for a female character, where a hit to the chest would direct all the force to the sternum.
